description_long: This object consists of three human-like dolls standing upright, each positioned on a red, irregularly shaped base that appears to represent a stylized urban surface. The dolls are sculpted in a classical style, with long robes and draped garments, and are spaced apart along the base. The central figure is more prominent, with a detailed head and torso, while the two flanking figures are slightly less detailed but similarly attired. The base has several holes and jagged edges, giving it a fragmented appearance, and there are small, block-like elements near one of the dolls. The overall color palette is dominated by red for the base and off-white or beige for the dolls, with some gray and black areas suggesting shadow or wear. The surface of the dolls appears hard and matte, resembling plaster or ceramic.
description: Three classical-style dolls in long robes stand on a fragmented red base, with detailed sculpting and a hard, matte finish.
description_view_0: Three robed dolls are visible on a red, jagged base, with the central figure most prominent and detailed.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the central doll and the thickness of the base, with less detail on the flanking figures.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backs of the dolls and the irregular, torn edges of the red base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the profile of the dolls and the layered structure of the base.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, classical draped robes in a Greco-Roman style, with flowing, unpatterned fabric in off-white or beige tones.
attribute_pose: All three dolls are standing upright with arms at their sides or slightly bent, heads facing forward, and legs together in a static, formal posture.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral facial expressions with closed mouths and relaxed eyes, showing no strong emotion.
attribute_hair_style: Short, sculpted hair with minimal detail, appearing as textured waves or curls in a classical style.
